cenas.dalle_prompt: Split screen: left side shows a dog pulling frantically on the leash, owner struggling, chaotic and stressful walk. Right side shows a dog walking calmly by the owner's side on a loose leash, relaxed and enjoyable walk, high contrast between the two scenarios, 8k quality
cenas.grok_movement: Static shot, the contrast between the two sides is the main focus

cenas.dalle_prompt: Trainer demonstrating the 'U-turn' method: as soon as the dog starts to pull, the trainer calmly turns and walks in the opposite direction, dog is surprised and has to catch up, 8k quality
cenas.grok_movement: Camera follows the trainer's sudden U-turn, capturing the dog's reaction and the immediate release of tension on the leash

cenas.dalle_prompt: Trainer rewarding the dog with a treat the exact moment the leash is loose and the dog is walking by their side, reinforcing the desired behavior, 8k quality
cenas.grok_movement: Close-up on the treat delivery, highlighting the positive reinforcement for the correct position

cenas.dalle_prompt: Dog and owner walking happily on a loose leash in a beautiful park, both relaxed and enjoying the walk, the ideal outcome, golden hour lighting, 8k quality
cenas.grok_movement: Slow-motion tracking shot from the side, capturing the peaceful and synchronized movement of the dog and owner

cenas.dalle_prompt: Final shot of the dog sitting calmly by the owner's side at a crosswalk, waiting patiently, demonstrating control and safety, text overlay 'Passeios Relaxantes e Seguros', 8k quality
